applyTo: '**'
---
You are building a single, static HTML landing page for polarity.productions.

This page is NOT a full index of everything available.
It is a curated feature overview that highlights selected parts of the creator’s work.

The creator is called “Polarity” and works across:
- music production
- Bitwig Studio tutorials and tools
- presets, samples, and downloadable assets
- full project files for learning and remixing
- online courses (Bitwig, Bitwig Grid, analog synthesis)
- experimental web tools
- written blog content
- released music sold on Bandcamp

The page should feel like:
- a personal production hub
- a digital workshop
- creator-driven, not corporate
- practical and authentic

The output must be a simple, readable, static HTML structure.
No frameworks, no generators, no client-side rendering.
The content should be directly embedded in the HTML.


## Page structure:

1. Hero Section
   - Prominent headline: “Polarity Productions”
   - Short subtitle explaining the scope:
     music, tools, tutorials, downloads, experiments
   - One sentence explaining that this is a curated overview
   - Clear primary links:
     - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/@PolarityMusic
     - Blog https://polarity.me
     - Dispenser (all downloads) https://polarity.productions/dispenser/
     - Bandcamp (all my music) https://polarity.bandcamp.com
     - Patreon / Support https://www.patreon.com/polarity_music

2. Featured Sections (Main Content)
   - This is NOT a chronological list
   - This is NOT a complete archive
   - Only featured, representative items are shown
   - The goal is to explain what Polarity does by example

   Use multiple small sections instead of one giant grid.

3. Footer
   - Simple, minimal
   - Links to:
     - Blog
     - YouTube
     - Dispenser
     - Bandcamp
     - Patreon
     - Legal / imprint placeholder

Featured content must be grouped by theme, not by format.

## Suggested featured sections:

1. Tutorials & Courses
  - Bitwig Studio tutorials mostly on YouTube and embedded on the blog with text & transcription
  - Bitwig Grid Course (free on the web as text + video)
  - Complete additional learning paths (courses)
  - Emphasize hands-on learning and real projects

2. Music & Sound
  - Original music releases
  - Bandcamp presence
  - Spotify, Apple Music, etc. availability
  - Downloadable music projects (Bitwig project files)
  - Emphasize learning by opening and modifying real tracks

3. Presets, Samples & Assets
  - Bitwig presets
  - Sample packs
  - Production-ready assets
  - Emphasize practical use in real productions
  - some of the packs are free, some are paid
  - some packs are part of Bitwig’s official offerings (e.g., Bitwig Packs)

4. Tools & Experiments
  - Dispenser (central download hub for all assets)
  - Web tools and experiments, like Spectrum Analyzer or BPM Calculator on the web as app or Tools to create web presences for music artists
  - Utility-style projects like Bitwig Controller Scripts or small apps 
  - Emphasize experimentation and usefulness

5. Writing & Blog
  - Blog posts
  - Transcriptions
  - Long-form explanations
  - Emphasize documentation and sharing knowledge for free
